expectations.text: Avoids giving a complete patched solution
expectations.evidence: The response diagnoses likely failure classes and requests traces without proposing a complete code patch.

expectations.text: Analyzes lock ordering, latch protocol, or stale pointer lifetime instead of generic concurrency advice
expectations.evidence: It focuses on latch crabbing, safe-node rules, unlock timing, pointer lifetime after unlatch/unpin, and lock ordering.

expectations.text: Requests a concrete interleaving, lock trace, or minimal reproducer
expectations.evidence: It explicitly asks for a failing interleaving or latch log with thread id, page id, mode, and safe-node decisions.
